name: lineup-desktop
description: Windows-first Electron desktop version of Lineup

scripts.build:electron: node tools/clean-electron-build.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node tools/copy-renderer-assets.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:harness-docs
scripts.verify:architecture: npm run lint && npm run verify:maintainability
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run verify:architecture && npm run test && npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:redaction
